codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the round-2 failure. Commit eb03e831 deletes `.factory/research/provider-research.md`, updates the final evidence to list that deletion, explains the deleted Z.AI/VibeProxy/OpenCode research is not DeepSeek context or current evidence, removes the prior retained `.factory/research/` claim, and states that no `.factory/research/` artifact is retained as DeepSeek evidence. Review of prior commit e20ec6b4 shows the exact prior misclassification; the new diff corrects it without production-code changes.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The go-provider-worker skill still narrows final-validation/evidence artifact-scope guidance to `.factory/docs` and `.factory/validation`, while mission AGENTS now correctly covers all Factory artifact directories. The worker followed the broader mission guidance, but the skill text could still encourage future omissions of `.factory/research`, `.factory/library`, or `.factory/skills`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/go-provider-worker/SKILL.md:29 mentions only `.factory/docs` and `.factory/validation`; mission AGENTS.md:104 broadens the rule to `.factory/docs`, `.factory/research`, `.factory/validation`, `.factory/library`, and `.factory/skills`; .factory/library/final-validation-smoke-handoff.md:21-31 now scopes/removes `.factory/research/provider-research.md`.

summary: Pass: the fix adequately addresses the prior failure by removing the unrelated research artifact and updating final evidence so Factory artifact directories are scoped accurately; no blocking issues found.
